title: More Mod Variants
description: A base modpack containing all the LieOn Studios' Variant Block/Item mods.
body:
# More Mod Variants

More Mod Variants is a base modpack containing all the LieOn Studios' Variant Block/Item mods.

You can use this modpack as a starting point when using the More Mod Variants for your own modpack.

## Automatic updates with MultiMC/PrismLauncher and packwiz(-installer)

This modpack was created with packwiz, meaning automatic updates are available with the [packwiz-installer](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/LieOnStudios/more_mod_variants/refs/heads/main/pack.toml). Follow the [documation here](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/LieOnStudios/more_mod_variants/refs/heads/main/pack.toml) on how to install the packwiz-installer, and in the custom commands in the MultiMC launcher, enter in:

```
"$INST_JAVA" -jar packwiz-installer-bootstrap.jar https://raw.githubusercontent.com/LieOnStudios/more_mod_variants/refs/heads/main/pack.toml
```

## Released/Planned Supported Versions

### Fabric

- 📝 ``1.20.1`` (Planned)
- ✔️ ``1.21.1`` (1st Release)
- 📝 ``1.21.4`` (Planned)
- 📝 ``1.21.5`` (Planned)

### Forge / NeoForge

Currently, none of [pnku](https://modrinth.com/user/pnku)'s mods are out for either loaders, so until they are, neither of these loaders are planned for support.
